title: CharacterData
description: Schema for a single character (base or support) in the Remaster Engine. v1.1.0: added 'neutral' to element enum (DEC-006/008), added stat block (DEC-004), removed vestigial 'innate' field (DEC-005/005a option A). Support slot refactor pending DEC-003a.

id.description: Lowercase snake_case identifier. Used as filename and lookup key.

element.description: Color element. Per §3.4 + DEC-006, 7 elements are locked: 6 color elements + 'neutral' for physical/non-elemental abilities and Chrono Cross specials.

level.description: Current level. Per §3.8 locked level-based progression.

is_base.description: True if this is one of the 6 main bases (Serge, Kidd, Nikki, Glenn, Herle, Norris). False for support characters.

innate.description: VESTIGIAL FIELD (DEC-005a option C): preserved because the crons' CharacterData loader depends on it. Per DEC-005, no canon character has an innate; innates come from EQUIPMENT, not elements. This field is kept for forward compatibility (e.g., a hypothetical 'white_leader' if Serge ever gets a player-anchor special). For now, all canon characters have 'innate: none' (or a vestigial element-tag like 'steal' for red, 'performance' for blue, kept for flavor).

stats.description: Base stats for the character. Per DEC-004, stats live on the character. Runtime scaling per level handled by StatResolver autoload.

spd.description: Base speed (turn order). Higher = acts first.

basic_attack.description: Display name of the basic attack line. Always present, always relevant. Per §3.5 locked basic-attack-line model.

tier_1_tech.description: Tech ID reference (lowercase_snake_case) for the tier 1 magic slot tech. Per §3.7 locked per-base techs, points to data/techs/<id>.json.

tier_8_tech.description: Tech ID reference (lowercase_snake_case) for the tier 8 ultimate. Per §3.7 locked per-base techs.

support_slots.description: List of support characters attached to this base at specific tiers. PENDING REFACTOR per DEC-003a: each support should become a 3-unlock structure (recruitment/story/final scenes). Schema kept as-is until DEC-003a is resolved.

sprite.description: Path to the character's field sprite. Empty string = placeholder rectangle per §15.3 PoC scope.

portrait.description: Path to the character's portrait. Empty string = placeholder.
